title: April 2026 release is ready
summary: The April 2026 monthly release is now available with refreshed CSV, Parquet, and MMDB package indexes.

title: MMDB packages added
summary: GeoIP Locations now publishes MMDB packages alongside CSV and Parquet for monthly IPv4 geolocation releases.

title: Large ALL packages published as release assets
summary: The ALL scope packages for CSV, Parquet, and MMDB are delivered through GitHub Release assets while country packages remain available through the release folder.

title: Download catalog expanded to three formats
summary: The monthly release catalog now separates CSV, Parquet, and MMDB package indexes so users can choose the format that best fits their workflow.
